identity.notes: Read-only endpoint set; requires at least directory read permissions in app registration.

security.notes: Sign-in, Defender incidents, secure score, and security alerts can require extra privileges in tightly governed environments.

auth_methods.notes: Authentication method policy and registration reports can require report-reading access.

intune.notes: Will return empty/unavailable datasets if tenant lacks Intune licensing.

sharepoint.notes: SharePoint tenant settings and site inventory can vary by role and service readiness.

teams.notes: Teams endpoints are still readable in many read-only role patterns.

exchange.notes: Command-based Exchange posture relies on Microsoft 365 CLI tenant and report commands; mailbox presence falls back to Graph only when CLI reporting is unavailable.
optional_commands: m365 outlook report mailboxusagemailboxcount --period D30 --output json
m365 outlook report mailboxusagequotastatusmailboxcounts --period D30 --output json
m365 outlook report mailboxusagestorage --period D30 --output json
m365 outlook report mailactivitycounts --period D30 --output json
